---
title: "Speakers"
---

::: {.speaker-gallery}

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/tiansi-dong.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Tiansi Dong"}](https://www.cst.cam.ac.uk/people/td540){target="_blank"}

### [Dr Tiansi Dong](https://www.cst.cam.ac.uk/people/td540){target="_blank"}

Alan Turing Institute<br>
University of Cambridge
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/alessandro-bonetti.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Alessandro Bonetti"}

### Dr Alessandro Bonetti

AstraZeneca
<!-- 
[![](assets/img/speakers/alessandro-bonetti.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Alessandro Bonetti"}](URL){target="_blank"}

### [Dr Alessandro Bonetti](URL){target="_blank"}

AstraZeneca -->
:::

:::
